case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS. MAYA MICHELLE ROYTMAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-29-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL CLAIMS MANAGER. DEFENDANT MAYA MICHELLE ROYTMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, MAYA MICHELLE AKA MAYA M. DVOSKIN CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-29-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.80 SERVED APR-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, MAYA MICHELLE AKA MAYA M. DVOSKIN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $871.88 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, MAYA MICHELLE AKA MAYA M. DVOSKIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
